_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

details: Successfully detected Y100-induced accumulation of autophagy protein p62, suggesting increased levels of p62-linked protein and inhibition of autophagy
